note: No generator exists for native Swift/AppKit. The scaffold phase must offer the three unsupported-stack options and, when the persona chooses to forge, route to groundwork-stack-forge: a self-contained Swift/AppKit engineer skill under .agents/skills/, a Day-2 seed wired into ./dev as a runner or project command (NOT Docker-shaped — `./dev start` must run the app, never no-op), and a Forged Stack Checklist in the hand-off. Verify `./dev start` is not an empty capability.
